# Navora Partners

> Navora Partners is an e-commerce paid media consulting firm that helps direct-to-consumer brands between $5M–$15M in annual revenue break through growth plateaus. We drive predictable, profitable growth through strategic media buying, creative strategy, and full-funnel optimization — tied back to the P&L, not platform dashboard metrics like ROAS.

Navora Partners serves DTC e-commerce founders and small executive teams who have hit a growth ceiling despite strong fundamentals. We operate as a strategic partner, not a generic agency, integrating paid media, funnel design, and cash flow forecasting into one coherent system. We optimize for real business outcomes (nCAC, MER, LTV, contribution margin) rather than vanity metrics (ROAS, CTR).

## Services

- [Growth-Clarity Decision System](https://navorapartners.com/#services): We reconcile platforms, P&L, and customer signals into one source of truth so leadership can see what's working, what isn't, and where the next dollar should go.
- [Paid Demand & Creative Engine](https://navorapartners.com/#services): We build a bespoke customer acquisition strategy focused on sustainability and profitability through structured testing and profit guardrails engineered around your brand economics.
- [Conversion & LTV Architecture](https://navorapartners.com/#services): We engineer the post-click and post-purchase experience to increase revenue per visitor and lifetime contribution, tightening payback windows.
- [Operating Cadence & Strategic Advisory](https://navorapartners.com/#services): We install the weekly rhythms, scorecards, and strategic support that keep the whole growth system aligned and compounding.

## Case Studies

- [Auto Parts Revenue from $280K to $1.5M/Month](https://navorapartners.com/case-studies/auto-parts-revenue/): California auto parts retailer with 30,000+ SKUs scaled monthly revenue 435% through strategic campaign restructuring and inventory-based segmentation.
- [Tallow Skincare Scaled from $100K to $600K/Month](https://navorapartners.com/case-studies/tallow-skincare/): The pioneer of the tallow skincare niche scaled 500% at 10x MER through feed optimization, categorical segmentation, and gateway product strategy.
- [Australian Air Purifier Brand Reverses Decline to 30% Annual Growth](https://navorapartners.com/case-studies/australian-air-purifier/): Reversed a revenue decline by escaping the PMax ROAS mirage, dropping nCAC by $98, and reigniting sustainable annual growth.
- [High-Ticket Fitness Brand to 170% Revenue Growth and 3x Account Scale](https://navorapartners.com/case-studies/fitness-brand/): Illinois celebrity-endorsed fitness recovery brand scaled 3x with consistent 5x ROI through manual network control and YouTube top-of-funnel.
- [Handmade Jewelry Brand to 3x Revenue in 24 Months](https://navorapartners.com/case-studies/handmade-jewelry/): Sea-inspired handmade jewelry brand tripled revenue while holding nCAC at 20% of AOV through tracking cleanup and feed segmentation.
- [Neurofeedback Device Brand Scaled Revenue 20% by Simplifying](https://navorapartners.com/case-studies/neurofeedback-device/): Two-SKU smart meditation headband brand achieved +30% ROI and +47% top-of-funnel traffic by consolidating duplicate campaigns and loosening ROAS targets.
- [Puzzle Retailer nCAC Cut from $40 to $15](https://navorapartners.com/case-studies/puzzle-retailer/): Niche brain-teaser puzzle retailer with 10,000+ SKUs exposed fake conversion data, switched to new-customer-only optimization, and cut acquisition cost 62%.
- [Declining RV Mattress Brand Turned into a $577K/Month Engine](https://navorapartners.com/case-studies/rv-mattress-brand/): Family-owned DTC RV mattress brand reversed declining performance and scaled monthly revenue to $577K with a contrarian ROAS-lowering strategy.

## About

- [About Navora Partners](https://navorapartners.com/about.html): Meet the team of e-commerce paid media experts dedicated to empowering DTC brands with predictable, profitable growth.
- [Case Studies Overview](https://navorapartners.com/case-studies.html): Complete index of client case studies showing real revenue growth, efficiency improvements, and market share gains across eight industries.
- [Careers](https://navorapartners.com/careers.html): Open roles and career opportunities at Navora Partners.

## Key Information

- **Ideal client profile:** DTC e-commerce brands with $5M–$15M in annual revenue, typically 2+ years established, 5–25 employees, spending 8–15% of revenue on marketing.
- **Common client pain points:** Growth plateaus, rising customer acquisition costs, conflicting data across platforms (Meta, Google, Shopify, Triple Whale), C-suite misalignment on marketing performance, profit erosion during aggressive scaling.
- **Core philosophy:** We optimize for real business outcomes measured at the P&L level (nCAC, MER, contribution margin, LTV) rather than platform metrics (ROAS, CTR). Revenue is the ultimate measure, not dashboard numbers.
- **Service area:** United States, Canada, Australia, with DTC brands globally.
- **Contact:** Growth Strategy Form at navorapartners.com
